description: Generates flat tree subway and stream plots that intuitively represents trajectories as linear segments on a 2D plane
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.VisualizeTrajectories GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.VisualizeTrajectories is a GenePattern module that Generates flat tree subway and stream plots that intuitively represents trajectories as linear segments on a 2D plane

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 18 parameters:
- Required: data.file, percentile.dist, figure.legend.num.columns, output.filename, subway.factor, color.by, factor.num.win, factor.min.win, factor.width, factor.zoom.in
- Optional: figure.width, figure.height, root, preference, flag.log.view, create.cell.plots, create.gene.plots, genes

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/visualization_command_line.py -m <data.file> -of <output.filename> <figure.width> <figure.height> <figure.legend.num.columns> <root> <preference> <subway.factor> <color.by>  <factor.num.win> <factor.min.win> <factor.width> <flag.log.view> <factor.zoom.in> <create.cell.plots> <create.gene.plots> <genes> <percentile.dist>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_visualization\:0.12

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing gene expression data

parameters.name: percentile.dist
parameters.description: Percentile of cells' distances from branches (between 0 and 100) used for calculating the distances between branches of subway map.

parameters.name: figure.legend.num.columns
parameters.description: The number of columns that the legend has.

parameters.name: preference
parameters.description: The preference of nodes. The branch with speficied nodes are preferred and put on the top part of subway plot. The higher ranks the node have, the closer to the top the branch with that node is. e.g. S3,S4.

parameters.name: subway.factor
parameters.description: The factor used to adjust the distances between branches of subway map.

parameters.name: color.by
parameters.description: Specify how to color cells.'label'\: the cell labels. 'branch'\: the branch id identifed by STREAM.

parameters.name: factor.min.win
parameters.description: The factor used to calculate the sliding window size based on shortest branch.

parameters.name: factor.width
parameters.description: The ratio between length and width of stream plot.

parameters.name: flag.log.view
parameters.description: If True,the number of cells (the width) is logarithmized when outputing stream plot.

parameters.name: factor.zoom.in
parameters.description: If flag_log_view is True, the factor used to zoom in the thin branches.

parameters.name: genes
parameters.description: comma delimited list of genes, e.g. Car2,Gata1,Epx
